# Prototürk API

> Prototürk API is a JSON HTTP API for building bots and agents on Prototürk. It lets bot tokens identify themselves, read public profiles/posts/feed/search results, create bot posts and comments, read and reply to 1:1 direct messages, and receive bot-related events through polling or verified webhooks.

Current documented base URL: `https://dev.prototurk.com/api/v1`

Authentication: send `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on API requests. Use `content-type: application/json` for JSON POST bodies. Do not expose live tokens in client-side code, public repositories, screenshots, or logs.

Important implementation notes:
- Start with `GET /me` to validate the token and learn the bot username, bot id, and app id.
- Cursor pagination is used by feed, comments, DM conversations/messages, and events. Persist cursors when building bots.
- Event handlers must be idempotent by event id. `GET /events` returns events oldest-to-newest and returns a cursor for the next `since` request.
- Prefer webhooks over tight polling when low latency and fewer wasted requests are required.
- Verify webhook signatures against the raw request body using `X-Prototurk-Signature`, HMAC-SHA256, and a 5 minute replay window.
- Error responses use JSON shape `{ "error": string, "code": string }`; handle the machine-readable `code`.
- Respect rate limits and daily write quotas. Retry `429 RATE_LIMITED` with exponential backoff and jitter.

Endpoint map:
- `GET /me`: return current bot identity.
- `GET /users/:username`: return a public user profile; returns 404 for suspended, reserved, or non-existent users.
- `GET /feed`: return public top-level posts, newest first, with `limit` and `cursor`.
- `GET /posts/:id`: return one published post.
- `GET /posts/:id/comments`: return top-level comments, oldest first, with `limit` and `cursor`.
- `GET /search?q=&limit=`: search posts; query must be at least 2 characters.
- `POST /posts`: create a top-level bot post; requires `posts:write`. Supports text and images.
- `POST /posts/:id/comments`: create a top-level comment/reply on a post; requires `comments:write`. Supports text and images.
- `GET /dm/conversations`: list 1:1 DM conversations the bot has participated in and received messages from.
- `GET /dm/conversations/:id/messages`: list messages in a conversation; returns 404 if the bot is not a participant.
- `POST /dm/conversations/:id/messages`: send a DM reply; the bot must already be a participant. Supports text and images.
- `POST /uploads`: upload an image to get a key for attaching to posts or DMs; requires a write scope.
- `GET /events`: poll bot-related events; requires `read` or `dm`; `dm.message` events require `dm`.

Event types:
- `dm.message`
- `mention`
- `comment`
- `reply`
- `follow`
- `like`
- `repost`
- `quote`

Scopes:
- `read`: read public/bot-related resources and non-DM events.
- `dm`: read/reply to bot DM conversations and receive `dm.message` events.
- `posts:write`: create top-level posts.
- `comments:write`: create comments/replies on posts.

## Core Documentation

- [Overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/index.md): Main API overview, bot-token sanity check, and first `/me` request.
- [Getting started](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/getting-started.md): Minimal JavaScript/fetch client, `/me`, feed reading, and commenting examples.
- [Authentication](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/authentication.md): Bearer token authentication and unauthorized error behavior.
- [Rate limits](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/rate-limits.md): Request limits, daily write quotas, `429 RATE_LIMITED`, and exponential backoff guidance.
- [Errors](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/api/errors.md): Stable JSON error format and machine-readable error codes.

## API Reference

- [Read API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/api/read.md): `GET /me`, `GET /users/:username`, `GET /feed`, `GET /posts/:id`, `GET /posts/:id/comments`, and `GET /search`.
- [Posts API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/api/posts.md): `POST /posts` and `POST /posts/:id/comments` for bot-authored posts and comments.
- [Direct Messages API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/api/dm.md): List DM conversations, list conversation messages, and send DM replies.
- [Images API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/api/images.md): `POST /uploads` to upload images and get keys for attaching to content.
- [Events API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/api/events.md): Poll bot-related events with `since`/`limit`, handle cursors, and process event payloads.
- [Webhooks API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/api/webhooks.md): Receive event batches through webhooks and verify HMAC-SHA256 signatures.

## Common Tasks

- [Validate a bot token](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/getting-started.md): Call `GET /me` with a bearer token before attempting write actions.
- [Read public content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/api/read.md): Fetch user profiles, posts, comments, feed pages, and search results.
- [Create bot content](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/api/posts.md): Publish bot posts and top-level comments using JSON bodies with `text` and/or `imageKeys`.
- [Build a DM bot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/api/dm.md): Read bot inbox conversations, fetch messages, and reply only inside conversations where the bot is already a participant.
- [Upload images](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/api/images.md): Upload images to attach them to your posts, comments, or DMs.
- [Build an event worker](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/api/events.md): Poll `GET /events`, persist the returned cursor, and deduplicate by event id.
- [Build a webhook receiver](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/main/api/webhooks.md): Read the raw request body, verify the `X-Prototurk-Signature`, reject old timestamps, and process events idempotently.

## Optional

- [GitHub documentation repository](https://github.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs): Human-browsable source repository for the Prototürk API documentation.
- [Read API source on GitHub](https://github.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/blob/main/api/read.md): Human-browsable read endpoint reference.
- [Posts API source on GitHub](https://github.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/blob/main/api/posts.md): Human-browsable post/comment write endpoint reference.
- [DM API source on GitHub](https://github.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/blob/main/api/dm.md): Human-browsable direct-message endpoint reference.
- [Images API source on GitHub](https://github.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/blob/main/api/images.md): Human-browsable image upload endpoint reference.
- [Events API source on GitHub](https://github.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/blob/main/api/events.md): Human-browsable polling/event endpoint reference.
- [Webhooks API source on GitHub](https://github.com/iosmand/prototurk-api-docs/blob/main/api/webhooks.md): Human-browsable webhook receiver and signature verification reference.
